Off Calendar May-20-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF SUPER PARKING INCORPORATED'S Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint And For An Order Granting Separate Judgment IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay, Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR # 5220 =301/REQ

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
Off Calendar Mar-11-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. SCOTT D. PEEBLES OF THE PEEBLES LAW OFFICES, TEL. NO. 287-4090 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY;
ATTY. VALERIO G. ROMANO, TEL. NO. 487-1700 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF SUPER PARKING INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED; THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS WHETHER THE TENANCY WAS FOR A LONGER TERM AND WHETHER PLAINTIFF IS ESTOPPED FROM RELYING ON WHAT STATUTE OF FRAUDS AS TO THE ASSERTED 5 YEAR LEASE. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(G). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol A. Karen CSR# 8189 =301/PJB
